name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual data entry causes late submissions and potential penalties. We automate the formatting instead of manual data entry into tax software.
problem_solved: Formatting payroll data for quarterly tax compliance reporting
